title: Canopy Growth Reports Third Quarter Fiscal Year 2025 Results
text: Canopy Growth reported Q3 FY2025 results demonstrating continued improvement in financial metrics. Sales and marketing and G&A expenses declined 24% year over year in Q3 FY2025, primarily due to the cost reduction program undertaken during fiscal 2024. Canada medical cannabis achieved a record quarter with net revenue increasing 16%. International markets cannabis net revenue grew 14% year-over-year. The company demonstrated strong execution on its transformation strategy with improving profitability metrics.
